case_title: STEPTOE, EUGENE VS LUIS' AUTO REPAIR (LUIS RODAS) et al

docket_entries.description: PROOF OF SERVICE FILED ON CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF SERVED AS TO DEFENDANT RODAS, LUIS

THE COURT HAS ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF STEPTOE, EUGENE RECOVER FROM DEFENDANT LUIS' AUTO REPAIR (LUIS RODAS) RODAS, LUIS $850.00 PRINCIPAL, $20.00 COSTS, TOTAL JUDGMENT $870.00, DEFENDANT LUIS' AUTO REPAIR DISMISSED WITHOUT PREJUDICE. NO PROOF OF SERVICE. STAY OF EXECUTION 30 DAYS
ORDER OF EXAMINATION ISSUED AS TO DEFENDANT RODAS, LUIS HEARING SET FOR APR-24-2000 AT 11:00 AM IN DEPT 506
ORDER OF EXAMINATION RETURNED SERVED, SERVICE DATE: APR-12-2000 AS TO DEFENDANT RODAS, LUIS
MONEY CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF FOR $850.00 FILED BY STEPTOE, EUGENE AS TO DEFENDANT LUIS' AUTO REPAIR (LUIS RODAS) RODAS, LUIS ORDER SETTING TRIAL ISSUED FOR AUG-10-1999 AT 10:00 AM IN DEPT 506
OEX DISPOSITION, CALENDAR OF APR-24-2000, DISCHARGED AS TO DEFENDANT RODAS, LUIS
MOTION FOR TIME PAYMENTS FILED BY DEFENDANT RODAS, LUIS HEARING SET FOR MAY-15-2000 AT 01:30 PM IN DEPT 506
PROOF OF SERVICE ON ORDER TO APPEAR FOR EXAMINATION, SERVED ON LUIS RODAS FILED.
PROOF WAS ACTUALLY FILED 4/25/00 & WAS BACKDATED FOR ENTRY PURPOSES. BOTH PARTIES APPEARED ON OEX HEARING 4/24/00. HEARING DISCHARGED.
SC MOTION DISPOSITION MOTION FOR TIME PAYMENTS OF MAY-15-2000, DENIED
